title: Archive verb: decisions archive + --all union reads (D4c)
action: Per CONTEXT D4c: new `decisions archive` verb moves superseded/redacted events (always) plus decide events strictly older than an explicit --before <ISO date> (never a default purge) from .bee/decisions.jsonl to .bee/decisions-archive.jsonl. RED-FIRST: extend test_decisions_propagation.mjs with the new checks FIRST, run red against unmodified code, record via cells verify, then implement. CONCURRENCY (plan-checker BLOCKER, same class as cells.mjs writeCell retrofit at cells.mjs:414-426): the append writers logDecision/supersedeDecision/redactDecision must acquire the SAME decisions store lock (lock.mjs) that archive holds — bare appendJsonl is only safe while nobody rewrites the file underneath; archive breaks that invariant, so the appends join the lock. CRASH SAFETY: cells' rename-journal does NOT map to jsonl line-partition — define archive's own ordering: (1) under the lock, append qualifying events to the archive file first, (2) then temp-write+rename the pruned active file; on crash between (1) and (2) a duplicate id may exist in both files — union reads de-duplicate by id (archive copy loses), making recovery automatic. Refuses (typed) when nothing qualifies. `decisions search`/`active` gain --all reading the union (active first, then archive, de-dup by id, newest-first). Default reads (no --all) byte-identical to today for an unarchived store. Idempotent second run is a clean no-op. Mirror to .bee/bin, tests (archive split, union read, idempotency, missing archive file, duplicate-id dedup after simulated partial crash, concurrent log-vs-archive under the shared lock), render + manifest.

truths: append writers and archive share ONE store lock — concurrent log-vs-archive loses no write
crash between archive-append and active-rewrite self-heals via union de-dup by id
search --all reaches archived events; default search unchanged for unarchived stores
RED-FIRST: failing run against unmodified code recorded as red evidence before implementation
prohibitions: No default age window — --before is explicit or the verb refuses
Never rewrite surviving active events (append-only integrity)
Never adopt cells' rename-journal for jsonl line surgery

trace.outcome: Archive shipped: decisions archive --before verb, shared locked-append primitive across all writers, crash-safe archive-first ordering with union de-dup, --all union reads
deviations: command-registry.mjs (+mirror) edited beyond cell.files: decisions.archive verb + --all flags wiring — necessary, minimal (schema entries only)

skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/race_decisions_child.mjs created (+.bee-render mirrors): worker-thread race module — necessary (sync check runner cannot await; mirrors race_claims_child pattern), reserved before creation
skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs +7 lines: example-execution coverage for the new decisions.archive registry entry — required by that suite's bijection check

checks.evidence: logDecision (decisions.mjs:203), supersedeDecision (:334), redactDecision (:357) wrap appendJsonl in withDecisionsLockSync; archiveDecisions holds the SAME lock (:412, DECISIONS_LOCK_NAME='decisions' :48). At HEAD all three were bare appendJsonl. Race tests pass (30/30): concurrent loggers+archiver lose no writes, never duplicate an id; external lock blocks logDecision rather than corrupting.
archive-append FIRST (:452) then temp-write+rename pruned active (writeJsonlAtomic :456); union de-dup active-wins (:506-511). Partial-crash duplicate-id test passes.
all=true unions (:503-544); all=false byte-identical to pre-dp-3 (:484-501). Registry exposes --all + decisions.archive (command-registry.mjs:540,560,569-584). Tests pass.
Second run throws typed DecisionsArchiveNothingQualifiesError (:445-447) before any write; files untouched. Test passes.
archiveDecisions/DECISIONS_LOCK_NAME/withDecisionsLockSync net-new at HEAD (0 matches) — new checks structurally fail pre-change; trace attempts fail(n1, 08:13, c167999bc898) -> pass(n2, 08:24).
Throws when --before missing/blank/invalid (:401-410); registry marks before Required.
toKeep preserved verbatim incl. malformed-but-parsed lines (:426-443); archive append-only.
Own append-first-then-atomic-rewrite ordering with union-dedup recovery (:385-392, :449-456); module-local writeJsonlAtomic, no cells journal import.

race_decisions_child.mjs necessary (sync check runner cannot await; mirrors race_claims_child pattern) and minimal; test_bee_cli.mjs +7 lines example-coverage; command-registry.mjs verb wiring — all necessary/minimal; recorded as deviations at cap per judge advisory.
